items.statement: With no arguments, hostname prints the name of the current host system.
items.source_quote_or_summary: With no arguments, hostname prints the name of the current host system.

items.statement: With one argument, it sets the current host name to the specified string.
items.source_quote_or_summary: With one argument, it sets the current host name to the specified string.

items.statement: You must have appropriate privileges to set the host name.
items.source_quote_or_summary: You must have appropriate privileges to set the host name.

items.statement: hostname is not installed by default, and other packages also supply a hostname command, so portable scripts should not rely on its existence or on the exact behavior documented above.
items.source_quote_or_summary: hostname is not installed by default, and other packages also supply a hostname command, so portable scripts should not rely on its existence or on the exact behavior documented above.

items.statement: An exit status of zero indicates success, and a nonzero value indicates failure.
items.source_quote_or_summary: An exit status of zero indicates success, and a nonzero value indicates failure.

items.statement: Pages that refer to this page: network_namespaces(7) , ip(8) , ip-vrf(8) , wg(8) , wg-quick(8).

items.statement: The address is a protocol (IPv4 or IPv6) address attached to a network device.
items.source_quote_or_summary: The address is a protocol (IPv4 or IPv6) address attached to a network device.

items.statement: Each device must have at least one address to use the corresponding protocol.
items.source_quote_or_summary: Each device must have at least one address to use the corresponding protocol.

items.statement: It is possible to have several different addresses attached to one device.
items.source_quote_or_summary: It is possible to have several different addresses attached to one device.

items.statement: These addresses are not discriminated, so that the term alias is not quite appropriate for them and we do not use it in this document.
items.source_quote_or_summary: These addresses are not discriminated, so that the term alias is not quite appropriate for them and we do not use it in this document.
